overall_status: PARTIAL CLOSURE — CANONICAL ELAMIPRETIDE AND CURRENT FORZINITY STATUS IDENTIFIED; SUPPLIER SALT, STERILITY, FORMULATION, MANUFACTURER AND COMPARABILITY OPEN
